prompt: Create an ultra-realistic luxury fashion editorial photograph of a beautiful European woman seated in a confident, relaxed power pose, framed from mid-thigh to above the head in a vertical 4:5 composition. She wears a bold fuchsia pink tailored power suit with exactly 3 visible outfit pieces: an oversized structured blazer with sharp shoulders and notch lapels, matching high-waisted pleated trousers with belt loops, and a silky deep-V blouse or vest underneath. Her hair is styled in a messy brunette bun with loose tendrils, and she wears exactly 2 large geometric gold hoop earrings, one on each ear. Pose her leaning back against minimalist geometric blocks, with one arm resting casually on a peach block at the right and the other arm relaxed near her lap, conveying poised confidence. Set the scene against a warm peach and lavender geometric studio backdrop with exactly 4 main visible background forms: a peach wall with a large triangular sunlight shape, a dark narrow vertical shadow strip, a saturated magenta-red vertical wall panel, and a lavender rectangular cube in the lower right foreground. Use dramatic direct sunlight, strong cinematic shadows, warm skin highlights, crisp editorial styling, Vogue-inspired high-fashion photography, rich color contrast, realistic fabric texture, natural hands, shallow depth of field, no text, no logo, no watermark.
